data.title: John Deere Ride On Toys Sit 'N Scoot Activity Tractor for Kids Ages 18 Months and Up, Green

features: Stable Design: Watch your kids scoot to their heart's content with a foot to floor John Deere tractor that includes a wide wheelbase for riding stability while they're exploring
Easy to Assemble: This John Deere tractor toy has a durable design that is is easy for parents to put together and makes it ready to roll in a matter of minutes
Ride On Vehicles: This ride on John Deere tractor toy is lightweight to help your toddlers maneuver around corners indoors or around obstacles outside in the backyard
Officially Licensed: This push and pull foot to floor tractor brings the barnyard home with authentic John Deere colors and details
just like kids see on the farm
Toddler Ride On: This fun ride on toy makes a fantastic addition to your little one's birthday gifts or Easter basket stuffers
suitable for ages 18 months and up to 60 pounds

Sections.Title: ATTACHABLE CART
Texts: Includes an easy-to-attach cart that is perfect for carrying a child’s items.

LITTLE FARMERS – This Tractor & Cart set is a must-have for little farmers on the go. With the tractor’s realistic features and foot-to-floor design, kids can enjoy imaginative play while developing large motor skills.
Features a working steering wheel and horn. Durable, tractor tires are high-quality and durable to last rugged outdoor play.

Layout_Blocks.Text: Includes an easy-to-attach cart that is perfect for carrying a child’s items.

LITTLE FARMERS – This Tractor & Cart set is a must-have for little farmers on the go. With the tractor’s realistic features and foot-to-floor design, kids can enjoy imaginative play while developing large motor skills.
Features a working steering wheel and horn. Durable, tractor tires are high-quality and durable to last rugged outdoor play.

relatedProducts.Product_Description: Little farmers will love to haul their harvests around with this toddler Tractor & Cart set. Powered by its foot-to-floor movement design and a working steering wheel, this tractor encourages hours of imaginative play and the development of large motor skills. The included cart attaches easily to the back of the tractor and can carry your child’s favorite toys, gardening supplies, and more. The tractor and cart both feature durable tires that last, ensuring this set will be a longtime favorite toy. Consumer Note: maximum weight is 50 lbs.

Sections.Title: Highlights:
Texts: Comes complete with an attached wagon

John Deere helps your child feel like part of the hauling action with this Pedal Tractor and Wagon ride-on toy set. This rugged ride-on features traditional John Deere green and yellow colors for an authentic look kids will love. The pedal powered ride-on includes an accessory wagon for all of your child's outdoor hauling needs. From toddlers to preschool, your boy or girl will love getting outside to enjoy creative play with the John Deere Pedal Tractor and Wagon!

John Deere fans of all ages will enjoy this selection of farm and off-road toys! These toys combine John Deere styling with durable design and super cool features. From infant to established collector- there’s something for everyone!

Similar_Items_Quick_Delivery.Product_Description: Product Description   John Deere helps your child feel like part of the hauling action with this Pedal Tractor and Wagon ride-on toy set. This rugged ride-on features traditional John Deere green and yellow colors for an authentic look kids will love. The pedal powered ride-on includes an accessory wagon where they can put their farm tools, dolls, action figures, or play food to feel like their farming role models! The pull-along wagon is perfect for all of your child's outdoor hauling needs. This John Deere ride on is a fantastic way to get your toddlers out in the sun and interested in the classic John Deere style. From toddlers to preschool, your boy or girl will love getting outside to enjoy creative play by creating a new adventure every day and “helping” with the day’s farming/yard work outdoors. Encourage their imaginations and get ready for days filled with hauling-action fun! This tractor toy tricycle and wagon attachment have a weight limit of 60 lbs. and are great gifts for kids ages 18 months and up.   From the Manufacturer   This tractor and wagon set is where John Deere meets child sized chores. Features traditional John Deere green and yellow deco. Pedal action with accessory wagon for hauling.

relatedProducts.Title: VEVOR Ride On Push Car for Toddlers, Ages 19+ Months, Ride Racer, Sit to Stand Toddler Ride On Toy, Kids Ride On Car with Music Steering, Horn & Under Seat Storage, Ride On Toy for Boys Girls, Red
relatedProducts.Features: PP | Suitable for 1-3 Year Olds: Designed just for little ones aged 1-3, this ride on push car helps them build balance while looking super stylish. Moms will love taking their kids out with this cool stroller! | 48.5 lbs/22 kg Strong Load Capacity: Made from tough, impact-resistant PP material and with a sturdy four-wheel design, this toddler ride on car can support up to 48.5 lbs/22 kg. It's built to last and give your kid endless fun. | Dynamic Car Music: Our toddler ride on toy's steering wheel plays cheerful kids' songs with just a press of a button, adding extra joy to playtime. Plus, the smooth design of the steering wheel makes it easy and comfy for your kid to steer. | Built-in Hidden Storage Space: The toddler riding car features a handy storage compartment under the seat, ideal for storing toys, water bottles, tissues, and more while out and about. It's a great way to help your kid learn to keep things tidy. | Anti-Backward Design: Security first! The ride on car has a wide backrest and an anti-backward support bar at the rear to keep your kid safe from tipping over while riding. Enjoy peace of mind while your little one rides around.
